items.title: Live Updates: Iran and Israel Exchange Strikes for First Time Since April Cease-Fire
items.summary: Iran fired missiles at Israel in retaliation for an Israeli attack in Lebanon. Hours after the Iranian launches, the Israeli military said it had struck military targets in Iran.
